jd_summary: Senior Organization Effectiveness Consultant acting as a strategic internal consultant to business leaders and People Business Partners at Autodesk, diagnosing org needs, defining operating models, and delivering OD/org-design solutions to improve organizational health, agility, and performance. Advanced degree in OD/I-O Psych preferred; posting is bilingual (English + French/Canada).
yoe_required: 6-8+ years in organization effectiveness, org design, or related

key_points.one_liner: Senior Org Effectiveness Consultant (6-8+ yrs OD/org-design) at Autodesk - strategic internal-consulting; YOE well above at-level.
key_points.years_experience_asked: 6-8+ years in organization effectiveness, org design, or related
must_have_skills: 6-8+ years of experience in organization effectiveness, org design, or related
Sound judgment and comfort operating in ambiguous environments, guiding leaders through complex organizational tradeoffs
Demonstrated ability to balance strategic thinking with pragmatic execution
Experience navigating complex, matrixed organizations and driving collaboration across diverse teams
Advanced degree in Organizational Development, I/O Psychology, Business, or related preferred
